name: talos
description: The bronze automaton guardian of Crete — automation & protection

scripts.build: bun run cli:build && bun packages/cli/dist/index.js monorepo:run --commands=build --logs
scripts.test: bun run cli:build && bun packages/cli/dist/index.js monorepo:run --commands=test --logs
scripts.check: bun install && bun run build && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.lint: bun run cli:build && bun packages/cli/dist/index.js monorepo:run --commands=lint --logs
scripts.npm:publish: bun run cli:build && bun packages/cli/dist/index.js monorepo:run --commands=npm:publish --logs
